channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ex-U.K. ambassador to U.S. arrested amid Epstein probe
item.description: Peter Mandelson, the former British ambassador to the U.S., was arrested on suspicion of misconduct in public office on Monday amid an investigation s...

item.title: Democrats look deep into Trump's territory for 2026 House pickups
item.description: Data: Dave's Redistricting Atlas, Cook Political Report, AP. (Virginia is in the process of redistricting.) Table: Axios Visuals Democrats plan to inv...

item.title: AI's "centaur phase" consumes Silicon Valley
item.description: A manic new phase of the AI boom is sweeping through Silicon Valley, powered by autonomous "agents" capable of liquefying weeks of manual labor into m...

item.title: Blizzard warnings, travel bans in effect as brutal storm pounds Northeast
item.description: Blizzard warnings blanket the Northeast Monday as a beastly winter storm is snarling travel and pounding millions with heavy snow. Threat level: In ha...

item.title: Trump's top general warns of Iran strike risks
item.description: Joint Chiefs Chairman Gen. Dan Caine has been advising President Trump and top officials that a military campaign against Iran could carry significant...

item.title: Supreme Court to consider whether states can sue over greenhouse gas emissions
item.description: Dozens of municipalities are seeking billions in damages from oil and gas companies, often accusing them of misleading the public about the links betw...

item.title: Judge Cannon orders secrecy for report on Trump classified-documents case
item.description: A federal judge in Florida blocked public release of special counsel Jack Smith’s extensive report into the classified-documents case against Presiden...

item.title: Trump’s top general foresees acute risks in an attack on Iran
item.description: The Joint Chiefs of Staff chairman has said that a lack of munitions and allied support could mean greater danger for U.S. troops, people familiar wit...

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel defends partying with U.S. Olympic ice hockey team
item.description: Videos of Patel celebrating in Italy went viral Sunday night, prompting criticism and questions about his judgment during a critical time for the FBI.

item.title: Trump again centers crime in immigration debate with White House vigil
item.description: The vigil centered victims’ families and crime in defense of the president’s deportation campaign, even as public support for his approach softens.

item.title: ‘I’ve won affordability’: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
item.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s old district to defend his economic record.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
